exports: class SmsError extends Error { code: SmsErrorCode; retryable: boolean; status: number | null }

invariants: Importing the part performs no I/O and never throws; configuration is validated at call time with typed errors
An invalid message fails fast with a typed error and zero network calls — the recipient must be E.164 and the body non-empty
Disallowed control characters in the body or sender are rejected before send (injection/garbage defense)
Transient vendor failures (429, 5xx, network) are retried up to 3 attempts with exponential backoff and jitter; permanent failures are never retried
All failures surface as typed SmsError values; raw vendor responses never escape the part
Secret values never appear in error messages
